description: Partial template for optic glioma clinical data capturing NF1 glioma classification, pathologic diagnosis, treatment, and disease characterization. Intended to be used as a mixin alongside a subject identifier template or combined with other clinical templates.

nf1GliomaType.description: High-level NF1 glioma type classification distinguishing between optic pathway and non-optic pathway, and by grade.
nf1GliomaType.title: nf1GliomaType

gliomaLocation.description: Location of glioma biopsied and/or resected.
gliomaLocation.title: gliomaLocation

gliomaPathologicDiagnosis.description: Pathologic diagnosis for gliomas, primarily low-grade types and glioneuronal tumors.
enum: Diffuse glioneuronal tumor with oligodendroglioma-like features and nuclear clusters
Diffuse low-grade glioma, MAPK pathway altered
Polymorphous low-grade neuroepithelial tumor of the young
gliomaPathologicDiagnosis.title: gliomaPathologicDiagnosis

hggPathologicDiagnosis.description: Pathologic diagnosis for high-grade gliomas (WHO grade 3 and 4).
enum: Diffuse hemispheric glioma, H3G34-mutant, WHO grade 4
Diffuse midline glioma, EGFR mutant subtype, WHO grade 4
Diffuse midline glioma, H3 K27-mutant subtype, WHO grade 4
Diffuse pediatric-type high-grade glioma, H3-wildtype and IDH-wildtype, WHO grade 4
High grade astrocytoma with piloid features
High grade glioma NOS (Not Otherwise Specified)
hggPathologicDiagnosis.title: hggPathologicDiagnosis

surgicalResectionAtDiagnosis.description: Type of surgical resection performed at diagnosis.
surgicalResectionAtDiagnosis.title: surgicalResectionAtDiagnosis

enum: Change in neurologic examination or function
Increase in Tumor Enhancement on MRI
Increase in Tumor Size on MRI
Other change in tumor in MRI
treatmentInitiationIndication.title: treatmentInitiationIndication

radiationAtAnyTime.description: Type of radiation received at any time for glioma treatment.
radiationAtAnyTime.title: radiationAtAnyTime

gliomaFrontlineRegimen.description: Frontline systemic treatment regimen(s) used for glioma. Select all that apply.

items.description: Controlled vocabulary for frontline systemic treatment regimens used in glioma.
items.title: GliomaFrontlineRegimenEnum

gliomaFrontlineRegimen.title: gliomaFrontlineRegimen

treatmentEndIndication.description: Indication(s) for end of first treatment regimen. Select all that apply.

items.description: Indication for end of first treatment regimen.
items.title: TreatmentEndIndicationEnum

treatmentEndIndication.title: treatmentEndIndication

title: OpticGliomaClinicalTemplate
